'''wajoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doability|doability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doability|doability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wajoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjereth|wæjereth]] || [[word:wæjerej|wæjerej]] || [[word:wæjeresh|wæjeresh]] || [[word:wæjere|wæjere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajojoroth|wajojoroth]] || [[word:wajojoroj|wajojoroj]] || [[word:wajojorosh|wajojorosh]] || [[word:wajojoro|wajojoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajoroth|wajoroth]] || [[word:wajoroj|wajoroj]] || [[word:wajorosh|wajorosh]] || [[word:wajoro|wajoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajofrofth|wajofrofth]] || [[word:wajofrofj|wajofrofj]] || [[word:wajofrofsh|wajofrofsh]] || [[word:wajofrof|wajofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajorotho|wajorotho]] || [[word:wajorojo|wajorojo]] || [[word:wajorosho|wajorosho]] || [[word:wajoroko|wajoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajoroth|wajoroth]] || [[word:wajoroj|wajoroj]] || [[word:wajorosh|wajorosh]] || [[word:wajoro|wajoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajorothol|wajorothol]] || [[word:wajorojol|wajorojol]] || [[word:wajoroshol|wajoroshol]] || [[word:wajorokol|wajorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajoroothotho|wajoroothotho]] || [[word:wajoroojojo|wajoroojojo]] || [[word:wajorooshosho|wajorooshosho]] || [[word:wajorooko|wajorooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajorothon|wajorothon]] || [[word:wajorojon|wajorojon]] || [[word:wajoroshon|wajoroshon]] || [[word:wajorokon|wajorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajorothooro|wajorothooro]] || [[word:wajorojooro|wajorojooro]] || [[word:wajoroshooro|wajoroshooro]] || [[word:wajorokooro|wajorokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
